introductionSomali: Unit-kan waxaad ku baranaysaa gaadiidka, qorshaynta safar, tigidhada, jadwallada, garoonka diyaaradaha, tagsiga, hoteelka, going to, safar hore, dhibaatooyin iyo ogeysiisyo safar.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar noocyada gaadiidka, dadka iyo goobaha safarka, iyo by transport/on foot.
learningObjectives: Faham oo adeegso erayada muhiimka ah ee Noocyada gaadiidka.

examples.english: Hello Amina, here is the plan for our trip next weekend. We are going to travel by coach on Friday. Please meet us at the central bus station at 7:00 a.m. The bus leaves at 7:30, so do not arrive late. The journey takes about five hours, and we are going to stop once for tea. Bring your identification, booking confirmation, and one small bag. When we arrive, we are going to take a taxi to the Sunrise Hotel. I booked two rooms for two nights, and breakfast is included. Check-in begins at 2:00 p.m. On Saturday morning, we are going to visit the old market and the city museum. In the evening, we plan to eat at a small restaurant near the hotel. On Sunday, we are going to check out at 11:00 a.m. and take the 1:00 p.m. bus home. We should arrive back at about 6:00 p.m. Please send me a message if you have any questions. I am looking forward to the trip.
examples.somali: Fariintani waxay sharxaysaa qorshe safar oo bas ah, waqtiga bixitaanka, tigidhka, boorsada, hoteelka iyo qorshaha soo noqoshada.

practiceExercises.question: Dooro macnaha saxda ah ee “On foot”.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabtu waa macnaha vocabulary-ga casharka. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: I go on foot.
options: Waxaan rabaa tigidh Nairobi ku socda.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaaddani waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha safarka. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: Dooro jumladda safarka ee dabiiciga ah.
options: I want a ticket to Nairobi.
practiceExercises.correctAnswer: I want a ticket to Nairobi.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jumladda saxda ahi waxay raacaysaa qaabka casharka. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: We travelled ___ bus.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Gaadiidka badankiis waxaa lala isticmaalaa by. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: Sax khaladka: I go by foot.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Socodka waxaa la yiraahdaa on foot. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: going / travel / am / I / to
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabku waa subject + am/is/are + going to + base verb. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Way safri doontaa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabtu waxay ilaalinaysaa macnaha iyo qaabka jumladda. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: Luggage badanaa waa uncountable.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Waxaa la yiraahdaa luggage ama two bags, ma aha luggages. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: Samee role-play gaaban oo ku saabsan Khaladaadka caadiga ah ee English-ka safarka.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharka iyo su’aalo cad. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: Qor shan jumladood oo ku saabsan Khaladaadka caadiga ah ee English-ka safarka.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi spelling, waqtiga iyo goobta safarka. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan Khaladaadka caadiga ah ee English-ka safarka. Adeegso ugu yaraan shan eray oo casharka ah; xog iyo qorshe tusaale ah isticmaal.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 8 ilaa 10 jumladood ama fariin kooban oo ku saabsan Khaladaadka caadiga ah ee English-ka safarka. Hubi waqtiga, goobta iyo qaabka jumladaha.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad dib u baratay Khaladaadka caadiga ah ee English-ka safarka. Hadda waxaad fahmi kartaa erayada muhiimka ah, su’aalaha iyo jawaabaha xaaladdan safarka.

quizQuestions.question: Dooro jumladda saxda ah.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabtu waxay raacaysaa English-ka safarka ee dabiiciga ah. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

quizQuestions.question: We are going to ___ a ticket.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Going to ka dib base verb ayaa yimaada. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

quizQuestions.question: “On foot” waa qaabka saxda ah.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Waxaa la yiraahdaa on foot. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dib u eeg dhammaan vocabulary, grammar, jadwallada, dialogues, reading iyo khaladaadka Unit 2.
learningObjectives: Faham oo adeegso erayada muhiimka ah ee Dib-u-eegista Unit 2.
Samee su’aalo iyo jawaabo safar oo A2 ah.
Ku dabaq luqadda xaalad tusaale ah adigoon bixin xogtaada dhabta ah.

grammar.sentenceStructure: Use the pattern required by the travel situation.

practiceExercises.question: Kee waa gaadiid dad badan qaada?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Bus waa nooc gaadiid. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Kee ayaa badda mara?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Ferry wuxuu dadka iyo gaadiidka ka gudbiyaa biyo. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Qofka diyaaradda wada waa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Pilot ayaa diyaaradda wada. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Dooro qaabka saxda ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Gaadiidku wuxuu qaataa by. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Socodka lugta waa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ahi waa on foot. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Meesha diyaaradaha laga raaco waa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Airport waa garoon diyaaradeed. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Qofka safraya laakiin aan wadin waa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Passenger waa rakaab. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Tigidh tagid iyo soo-noqosho waa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Return ticket wuxuu daboolaa labada jiho. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: How much is the ___?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Fare waa qiimaha safarka. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: A ticket ___ Nairobi.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Destination-ka tigidhka wuxuu qaataa to. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Haddii kuraas dhammaadeen waxaa la yiraahdaa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Sold out waa wax la iibiyay oo dhammaaday. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Bus 08:00–10:30 wuxuu qaataa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Farqiga waqtigu waa 2:30. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Tareenku xaggee ka baxaa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Tareenku wuxuu ka baxaa platform. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Airport-ka meesha check-in lagu sameeyo waa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Check-in desk ayaa dukumentiyada lagu hubiyaa. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Where do you collect bags after a flight?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Baggage claim ayaa boorsooyinka laga qaataa. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Flight delayed maxay tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Delayed waa dib u dhacay. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Kee ayaa baska laga weydiin karaa?
options: Where is customs in the hotel?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Su’aashani waxay ku habboon tahay saldhig. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Hotel-ka qofka soo dhoweya waa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Receptionist ayaa reception-ka jooga. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Qol hal qof ah waa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Single room waxaa loogu talagalay hal qof. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: I have a ___.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Booking hotel waxaa la yiraahdaa reservation. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: What time is ___?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Su’aashani waxay weydiinaysaa waqtiga bixitaanka hoteelka. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Dooro going-to sax ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Am + going to + base verb. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: She ___ going to fly.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: She waxay qaadataa is. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: We ___ going to stay long.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: We waxay qaadataa are/aren’t. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Dooro su’aasha saxda ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Are + subject + going to + base verb. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Going to ka dib kee sax ah?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Base verb ayaa yimaada. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Short answer: Is she going to stay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Short answer-ku wuxuu isticmaalaa be verb. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Past-ka leave waa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Leave → left. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: The journey ___ five hours.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Take → took ee Past Simple. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Dooro past sentence sax ah.
options: We did stayed at a hotel.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Stayed waa regular past. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: I ___ the bus yesterday.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Dhacdo hore waxay qaadataa missed. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: My luggage is ___.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Boorso aan la helin waa missing. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: The train is cancelled. Maxaa la sameeyay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Cancelled waa baajis. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: I lost my ticket. Weedha caawimada saxda ahi waa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Weedhani si cad ayay caawimo u codsanaysaa. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

practiceExercises.question: Qolka hoteelku diyaar ma aha. Yaa lala hadlayaa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Receptionist ayaa arrimaha qolka ka caawiya. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Stayed waa regular past. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

unitQuiz.question: I ___ the bus yesterday.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Dhacdo hore waxay qaadataa missed. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

unitQuiz.question: My luggage is ___.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Boorso aan la helin waa missing. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

unitQuiz.question: The train is cancelled. Maxaa la sameeyay?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Cancelled waa baajis. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

unitQuiz.question: I lost my ticket. Weedha caawimada saxda ahi waa?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Weedhani si cad ayay caawimo u codsanaysaa. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

unitQuiz.question: Qolka hoteelku diyaar ma aha. Yaa lala hadlayaa?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Receptionist ayaa arrimaha qolka ka caawiya. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

unitQuiz.question: Gate changed maxay tahay?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Gate changed waa beddel goobta fuulitaanka. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

unitQuiz.question: Final boarding call waa?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Waa ogeysiiska ugu dambeeya ee rakaabka. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

unitQuiz.question: Keep your ticket maxay ku faraysaa?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Keep waa hayso. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

unitQuiz.question: Fariinta safarka: busku 7:30 ayuu baxayaa, safarkuna 5 saac. Goorma ayuu qiyaastii imanayaa?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: 7:30 + 5 saac = 12:30. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.

unitQuiz.question: Dialogue: “I have a reservation.” Xaggee ayay u badan tahay?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Reservation-ka qolka waxaa lagu xaqiijiyaa reception-ka. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg qaybta la xiriirta.
